title: Untwisting twisted spectral triples
author_string: Magnus Goffeng, Bram Mesland, Adam Rennie
journal: International Journal of Mathematics, Vol. 30, No. 14 (2019)
journal_ref: International Journal of Mathematics, Vol. 30, No. 14 (2019)
abstract: We examine the index data associated to twisted spectral triples and higher order spectral triples. In particular, we show that a Lipschitz regular twisted spectral triple can always be `logarithmically dampened' through functional calculus, to obtain an ordinary (i.e. untwisted) spectral triple. The same procedure turns higher order spectral triples into spectral triples. We provide examples of highly regular twisted spectral triples with nontrivial index data for which Moscovici's ansatz for a twisted local index formula is identically zero.
comment: 57 pages, full proof of meromorphic extensions added in this version
